title: calculation.eec.failed data
description: Data payload for the calculation.eec.failed event. Models CalcResult.Error from activitycontracts alongside standard traceability fields.

jobId.description: UUIDv7 job identifier; also the Temporal workflow ID.

tenantKey.description: Tenant identifier of the submitting organization.

calcType.description: Calculator type. Always 'eec' for this event.

calcName.description: Optional human-readable calculation name supplied at submission.

failedAt.description: UTC timestamp when the failure was recorded.

errorMessage.description: Human-readable failure description, sourced from CalcResult.Error.
